events.text: Alexander Fleming discovered the first natural antibiotic produced by Penicillium mold in this year
Vancomycin was discovered by Eli Lilly and Company researchers from a soil sample sent by a missionary from the jungles of Borneo in this year
In this year, a German pathologist discovered Sulfa drugs while searching for antibacterial dyes
Researchers discovered Daptomycin from soil samples containing Streptomyces roseosporus from Mount Ararat, Turkey
Cephalosporins were isolated from the fungus Cephalosporium acremonium from a sewage outfall in Sardinia in this year
